title: Does General Caster support exist?
excerpt: Does anyone know how to get a hold of General Caster support?  I’ve sent in three requests over the past week to help@generalcaster.app and there’s no response.  There’s not even an auto-response to know that the request…

posts.author: jaquelyn (Jackie Lacovara)
posts.cookedHtml: Does anyone know how to get a hold of General Caster support? I’ve sent in three requests over the past week to help@generalcaster.app and there’s no response. There’s not even an auto-response to know that the request has been received. I’m not able to set up any new GC automations in our account and I’ve indicated in my message to them that it’s an urgent request, but just no response or acknowledgment from them at all.

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @jaquelyn,

Welcome to the community!

I’m sorry to hear about the struggles you’ve had getting in contact with General Caster! Would you mind opening a support request here so we can help you get in touch with them?

Thanks,
Rachel
